headline: Trump's Golden Dome Blasted By Dems As A 'Gold-Plated Boondoggle'
summary: Critics warn Trump's Golden Dome missile-defense plan could spark a trillion-dollar arms race. Dems call it a 'gold-plated boondoggle'.

headline: Citigroup Lowers General Dynamics (GD) Target but Sees Opportunity after Recent Pullback
summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) is included among the 10 Best Long Term Low Risk Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 18, Citigroup lowered its price recommendation on General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) to $364 from $380. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares. headline: CLEAR and GDIT Announce Strategic Collaboration Agreement
summary: CLEAR (NYSE: YOU), the security identity company, and General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT), a business unit of General Dynamics (NYSE: GD), today announced a strategic collaboration agreement to deliver secure digital identity management and verification solutions for federal health and civilian agencies.
